tool_args.label: Tremont Avenue Busway
tool_args.raw_text: Eastbound busway from Third Av to Southern Blvd • Westbound busway from Southern Blvd to Belmont Av

payload.description: Busway on Tremont Avenue with eastbound segment from Third Av to Southern Blvd and westbound segment from Southern Blvd to Belmont Av. In effect 7 days a week, 6am-8pm. Buses, trucks, emergency vehicles, and Access-a-Ride vans can travel through entire corridor. Local access allowed for all other vehicles with required right turn.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Eastbound busway from Third Av to Southern Blvd • Westbound busway from Southern Blvd to Belmont Av
In effect 7 days a week, 6am – 8pm • Buses, trucks, emergency vehicles, and Access-a-Ride vans can travel through entire corridor

tool_args.label: Offset Bus Lane: Webster Av to Third Av
tool_args.raw_text: Gateway treatment: 4 blocks of offset bus lane from Webster Av to Third Av, eastbound only

payload.description: 4 blocks of offset bus lane from Webster Av to Third Av, eastbound only. Gateway treatment. Offset lane preserves parking and curb access. Bus lanes in effect 24/7 and shared with bikes.

normalized_location.raw_text: Webster Avenue to Third Avenue, Tremont Avenue, Bronx
